principles.name: test_edge_cases
principles.description: Always test edge cases: empty input, null input, single element, boundary values, max/min values.

principles.name: test_error_paths
principles.description: Test error/exception paths with equal rigour to happy paths. Every catch block should have a corresponding test.

principles.name: test_in_isolation
principles.description: Unit tests should test one thing. Mock external dependencies. No shared mutable state between tests.

principles.name: test_names_describe_behaviour
principles.description: Test names should describe the expected behaviour, not the implementation: test_returns_empty_for_null_input not test_function_1.

principles.name: arrange_act_assert
principles.description: Structure tests as Arrange-Act-Assert (or Given-When-Then). One logical assertion per test.
